corusel.title_main: Carpet rental - style, safety, and practicality in every space.
corusel.title_sub: Our high-quality carpets help keep spaces clean and presentable while creating a pleasant first impression for visitors. We take care of the entire service - from carpet replacement to maintenance.
corusel.title_main2: Comprehensive work wear solution for every profession
corusel.title_sub2: Thoughtful work wear solutions ensuring comfort, safety, and a professional appearance for employees in every industry.
corusel.title_sub3: Reliable and modern solutions for a clean, convenient, and professional environment.
corusel.title_main4: Clean and simple - towels and mops for everyday use
corusel.title_sub4: Rent high-quality, clean, and always functional equipment for your business.

intro.header: Textile, work wear and sanitary services for businesses
intro.sub_header: Circular economy-based rental and maintenance services for carpets, work wear, and sanitary solutions - ensuring a clean, comfortable, and safe working environment for employees and customers every day, while reducing costs and environmental impact.

benefits.benefit1: Worry-free service - washing, maintenance, and replacements are our responsibility.
benefits.benefit3: Sustainable solution - circular economy and smaller environmental footprint.
benefits.benefit4: Reliable partner - presence and support in everyday operations.

clients.business_hover: Offices, business spaces, salons, hairdressers, etc.
clients.goverment_hover: Municipalities, police, rescue services, ambulances, courthouses, etc.
clients.fun_hover: Sports and water centers, libraries, museums, etc.
clients.fun_btn: Didn't find your sector? Write to us.

form.cta_btn_note: The submitted data will be processed according to the privacy policy.
form.header2: Request a Quote or Get Assistance
form.para: If you found a suitable product or need help choosing, fill out the form and we will contact you.

chatbot.start_intro: I'll ask a few questions to create a suitable offer for you.
chatbot.question_vaip_asukoht: Where do you need the carpet?
chatbot.option_vaip_other_clar: Please briefly describe where you need the carpets:
chatbot.question_vaip_amount: How many carpets do you need?
chatbot.question_vaip_frequency: How often do you need carpet replacement?
chatbot.option_vaip_type: Which type of carpet do you need?
chatbot.option_vaip_size: Do you know the size of the carpet?
chatbot.option_vaip_size_no: I don't know, I need guidance
chatbot.option_vaip_size_clar: Please enter the carpet dimensions (e.g., 120x180 cm):
chatbot.option_riie_which: Which work wear do you need?
chatbot.option_riie_feature: Does the work wear require any special features?
chatbot.option_riie_amount: How many sets do you need?
chatbot.option_riie_color: Do you want the work wear in a specific color or add logos/names/customizations?
chatbot.option_riie_color_3: I want to add a logo or name
chatbot.option_riie_color_4: I want both color and logo/name
chatbot.option_hygiene: Which sanitary supplies do you need?
chatbot.option_hygiene_amount: How many items do you need?
chatbot.question_hygiene_frequency: How often do you need replenishment?
chatbot.option_hygiene_feature: Should the products have specific size, color, or material?

lahendus.sub_intro: We provide comprehensive mat, work wear, and hygiene solutions. Below you will find an overview of all the solutions we offer.

vaip.info: Additional info - click on the image
vaip.sub_intro: We provide professional entrance mat services to keep your premises clean and presentable. We maintain mats regularly and offer solutions for both indoor and outdoor environments.
vaip.sub_opt: The nylon mat collects up to 3 kg of dirt and works around the clock to ensure a cleaner working environment. Thanks to its rubber backing, the mat stays in place while its fibers trap dirt until the next replacement.
vaip.sub_opt2: The mat stops water and wet dirt from spreading, absorbing on average 4.4 liters of water. This helps keep buildings dry and reduces the risk of slipping. The rubber backing ensures the underside stays dry.
vaip.sub_opt3: A two-in-one mat that effectively collects both dirt and water, quickly absorbing moisture and debris to ensure optimal cleaning performance in any environment. Its innovative fiber structure keeps floors clean and dry, reducing risks associated with wet surfaces.
vaip.sub_opt4: Custom-made logo mats attract attention and help promote your brand, product, or service. Shape, dimensions, and colors can be tailored to suit your space and preferences.
vaip.sub_opt5: Designed to enhance comfort and productivity by providing stable and healthy standing support. The mats distribute pressure evenly across the feet, reducing fatigue and improving circulation. Beveled edges and a special backing ensure slip resistance.

riided.sub_intro: We provide work wear that supports daily tasks and suits various working environments. Our selection focuses on comfort, durability, and professional corporate appearance.
riided.sub_opt: The Motion jacket is designed for industry, logistics, car dealerships, and warehouses. With a modern cut and excellent fit, it offers freedom of movement thanks to elastic shoulder panels and practical storage with multiple pockets.
riided.sub_opt2: Motion work trousers are a customer favorite, offering comfort and durability for everyday work. With a modern fit and practical pockets, they are ideal for industrial and logistics environments.
riided.sub_opt3: High-quality and highly durable T-shirt for both men and women. Can be combined with all our collections and is available in a wide range of colors.
riided.sub_opt4: High-quality and highly durable polo shirt for both men and women. Can be combined with all our collections and is available in various colors.
riided.sub_opt5: Our sweatshirt is soft, comfortable, and durable. Available in multiple models and colors, including pullover and zip-up styles.
riided.sub_opt6: Our all-time customer favorite fleece jacket, soft and comfortable, available in multiple models and colors.
riided.sub_opt7: Certified according to ISO 20471 standards. Available in bib and standard models with different classification levels for enhanced visibility.
riided.sub_opt8: Certified according to ISO 20471 standards. Insulated, breathable, oil-, dirt-, and water-repellent with high-visibility fabric for maximum safety.
riided.sub_opt9: Trousers that provide excellent mobility and breath ability, available in a wide range of colors.

wc.sub_intro: We provide all hygiene solutions from a single source - from hand hygiene to air freshening. A comprehensive service that allows you to focus on your core business.
wc.sub_opt: The automatic roll towel dispenser ensures touch-free and hygienic use. A smart sensor dispenses paper automatically, reducing waste and ensuring optimal consumption. Easy to refill and convenient to use, with high-quality absorbent paper for a pleasant user experience.
wc.sub_opt2: A hygienic and economical solution for hand drying. The closed case protects the paper, and the angled design ensures one sheet at a time dispensing, reducing waste. Includes high-quality, highly absorbent paper towels with a convenient service solution.
wc.sub_opt3: Provides a hygienic and environmentally friendly hand-drying solution. Automatic rewinding ensures a clean section every time. The 100% cotton towel is soft, highly absorbent, and features antibacterial finishing with an elegant design.
wc.sub_opt4: Combines hygienic use with elegant design. Available in manual and sensor versions, dispensing precisely 0.4 ml of foam soap for effective and skin-friendly hand hygiene. The anti-drip system reduces waste, and regular refilling ensures convenience.
wc.sub_opt5: Touch-free sanitizer dispenser ensures hygienic and convenient use by dispensing a precise amount of alcohol-based foam. The caring formula prevents dry hands, and the economical system allows up to approximately 1250 doses.
wc.sub_opt6: High-quality foam soap ideal for daily hand washing, offering a mild fragrance, moisturizing care, and a silky clean feel. The sealed anti-drip cartridge ensures hygienic, efficient, and environmentally friendly use.
wc.sub_opt7: Durable and reliable 5-liter abrasive hand soap dispenser, ergonomic and easy to use, ideal for industrial and heavy-duty hand washing environments.
wc.sub_opt8: 3-in-1 shower gel dispenser provides hand, body, and hair wash in all washing environments, especially in showers, locker rooms, and bathrooms, combining functionality and hygiene.
wc.sub_opt9: Provides a pleasant and fresh atmosphere in washrooms, neutralizing unpleasant odors for up to 90 days. Available in automatic and manual versions, distributing fragrance discreetly and evenly while being eco-friendly and allergen-free.
wc.sub_opt10: Designed with female restroom users in mind, offering discreet and hygienic waste disposal. Available in 20L and 4L wall-mounted models with odor- and bacteria-neutralizing granules. Our full service ensures regular cleaning and maintenance.
wc.sub_opt11: Wall-mounted, convenient, and hygienic waste bin for restrooms, allowing quick and discreet liner replacement. Available in 20L and 50L models.
wc.sub_opt12: Allows users to conveniently and hygienically clean toilet seats, killing 99.9% of bacteria and drying quickly. Simple three-step use: dispense foam onto paper, wipe, and disinfect. Regular refilling included in the full service.
wc.sub_opt13: Provides a hygienic and practical solution for restroom cleanliness using closed, disposable containers replaced regularly. Our solutions adapt to your needs for a high-level user experience.
wc.sub_opt14: Holds two rolls, ensures cleanliness, and provides up to eight times more paper capacity. Lockable and eco-friendly design reduces waste and allows color selection to match the interior.
wc.sub_opt15: Compact, wall-mounted dispenser keeping sanitary pads and tampons safely accessible. Manufactured in Europe from durable, recyclable metal and lockable with a key.

mopp.intro: Floor Care and Cleaning Textile Service
mopp.sub_intro: A comprehensive service ensuring clean and ready-to-use mops and towels at all times. A solution that supports hygiene and smooth workflow.
mopp.sub_opt: Microfiber wet mop cleans floors effectively even without chemicals. Pre-moistened mops are ready to use immediately, enabling a faster cleaning process.
mopp.sub_opt2: Microfiber dry mop effectively removes dust and dry dirt while preventing dust from becoming airborne. Suitable for use before and after wet cleaning.
mopp.sub_opt3: We provide ergonomic mop handles designed to reduce heavy and exhausting cleaning work, ensuring more comfortable and efficient operations.
mopp.sub_opt4: 100% cotton kitchen towel rental service ensures clean, highly absorbent, and lint-free towels at all times. Convenient full service with regular replacement and washing.

meist.kes_p: Textile Service is an international service company providing workwear, hygiene, and cleanliness solutions to businesses across Europe. Our goal is to make everyday working life simpler, safer, and more sustainable by offering a full-service solution that combines quality, responsibility, and innovation. Our business model is based on the circular economy – many of our products can be rented instead of purchased. This means a smaller environmental footprint, more efficient use of resources, and a worry-free service for our clients.
meist.mida_p: We help companies maintain clean, functional, and efficient working environments by offering comprehensive solutions ranging from workwear and protective clothing to hygiene, maintenance, and logistics. Our services are designed to ensure that the entire process is smooth, consistent, and tailored to the actual needs of each client. By taking care of daily management and maintenance, we enable our clients to focus on what matters most – their core business.
meist.meie_p: Our work is guided by values that create a reliable foundation for cooperation with both clients and partners. Respect, integrity, and responsibility are the principles that shape our daily decisions and service development. We aim to operate in a transparent, caring, and exemplary manner, being a trusted partner and a responsible employer.
meist.tulevik_p: Sustainability is an integral part of our strategy and guides our actions today and in the future. We focus on resource efficiency and reducing water and energy consumption throughout the entire value chain. Social responsibility is also important to us – we invest in employee well-being and development while creating a safe and professional working environment. Textile Service continuously develops its operations through innovation and digitalization to remain a reliable partner in the future.
meist.inimesed_p: Textile Service employs people with clearly defined roles and responsibilities within their respective fields. Our team brings together specialists with diverse backgrounds and experience who collaborate to ensure the smooth operation and continuous development of the organization. Decisions are based on knowledge and experience, every contribution forms part of a larger whole, and in our work we value professionalism, clear communication, and accountability. The Textile Service team is built on a long-term perspective – stability, growth, and reliability.

uudised.sisse_p: Follow our latest updates, innovations, and company developments.
uudised.hooldus_p: Our new carpet maintenance program ensures faster and more efficient service for every client.
uudised.koll_p: We are introducing our new collection designed to provide maximum comfort, visibility, and safety at work.
uudised.san_p: New restroom solutions – cleanliness and comfort every day.
uudised.vast_p: Circular economy solutions help reduce environmental impact and operational costs.

kontakt.sub_header: Send us a message or request a quote. We will respond as soon as possible!
